# Basic raft interactions: elections, proposals, replication, leader transitions.
# No witness — witness interactions belong in scenario/.

add-voters
v1: [a1]
v2: [a1 b2]
----
v1: [a1] term=a cfg=(v1 v2)
v2: [a1 b2] term=b cfg=(v1 v2)

# v2 campaigns. Its log is more up-to-date, everyone votes yes.
campaign v2
----
v2 campaigns at term c
v2: yes (self)
v1: yes
outcome: won

# Propose and replicate. Both voters have the entries, quorum reached.
propose v2
----
v1: [a1] term=c cfg=(v1 v2)
v2: [a1 b2 c3 c4] term=c cfg=(v1 v2) leader

append v2
----
v2 appends through c4
v1: ok
v1: [a1 b2 c3 c4] term=c cfg=(v1 v2)
v2: [a1 b2 c3 c4] term=c cfg=(v1 v2) committed=c4 leader

# Leader transition: v1 campaigns. Logs match, all yes.
campaign v1
----
v1 campaigns at term d
v1: yes (self)
v2: yes
outcome: won

propose v1
----
v1: [a1 b2 c3 c4 d5 d6] term=d cfg=(v1 v2) leader
v2: [a1 b2 c3 c4] term=d cfg=(v1 v2)

append v1
----
v1 appends through d6
v2: ok
v1: [a1 b2 c3 c4 d5 d6] term=d cfg=(v1 v2) committed=d6 leader
v2: [a1 b2 c3 c4 d5 d6] term=d cfg=(v1 v2)
